subcodes.first_line: O thou dear one! Thou hast written with joy. The absence of thy father is but temporary, while the aid and bounty of God is eternal and constant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عزیزا تحریر تسریر ایلدی حضره بدرک غیابی موقت در عون و عنایت حق موبد در عین
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @poems and quotation from poetry, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @silence; fewness of words, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @wisdom [hikmat]
